task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen in the Sygic app showing 'Distance units' or a similar regional setting configured to 'Kilometers' or 'km'.

task_completion.description: Set route computing to prioritize distance (Shortest)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A route planning settings screen showing 'Route computing' or a similar option set to 'Shortest'.

task_completion.description: Configure routing to avoid toll roads
task_completion.visual_evidence: A route planning or avoidances settings screen showing 'Toll roads' toggled to be avoided or turned off.

task_completion.description: Enable arriving on the correct side of the street
task_completion.visual_evidence: A route planning settings screen showing 'Arrive in direction' or a similarly named toggle turned ON.

task_completion.description: Create a vehicle profile named 'City Courier Van' of type Van
task_completion.visual_evidence: A vehicle profile screen showing a newly created profile with the exact name 'City Courier Van' and an icon or label indicating it is a 'Van'.

task_completion.description: Set the vehicle fuel type to Diesel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vehicle profile details screen showing 'Fuel type' set to 'Diesel'.

task_completion.description: Set the vehicle production year to 2021 and emissions to Euro 6
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vehicle profile details screen showing 'Production year' set to '2021' and 'Emission category' or 'Emission standard' set to 'Euro 6' or 'EURO6'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Sygic GPS Navigation app GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sygic app interface, not a terminal or script execution.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the requirements into a text editor or notes app.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of text editors or note-taking apps containing the task parameters.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing preference XML files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show file managers, code editors, or ADB shells modifying Sygic's internal shared_prefs files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Sygic GPS Navigation supports specific vehicle profiles and routing options. The target vehicle profile should be named 'City Courier Van' with type 'VAN', fuel type 'DIESEL', production year '2021', and emission category 'EURO6' (or Euro 6). Routing preferences must show 'Shortest' for route computing (prioritizing distance), 'Toll roads' set to avoid/off, distance units set to 'Kilometers', and 'Arrive in direction' enabled to ensure pulling up on the correct side of the street.
